title: Panzanella Salad with Honey Croutons
description: A twist on the classic Italian bread salad, with crispy honey croutons and a sweet, tangy dressing.
instructions: Toss bread cubes with honey and a pinch of salt until evenly coated.
Spread bread mixture on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine tomatoes, mozzarella, and panzanella dressing.
Once croutons are ready, add them to the bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh basil if desired.
